  • Overview

  • Deprecated
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Agent
    Represents an agent moving through the evacuation graph toward an exit.
    Agent.ArrivalBehavior
    What the agent does when it arrives at its destination.
    Agent.Behavior
    The movement behavior of an agent when navigating.
    Agent.DestinationMode
    The destination selection mode.
    Agent.MovementState
    The movement state of an agent.
    Agent.PsychologicalState
    The psychological state of an agent.
    DangerZone
    Represents a danger zone node in the evacuation graph.
    DangerZone.DangerType
    The type of danger represented by this zone.
    DangerZone.TypeDanger
    Deprecated.
    Use DangerZone.DangerType
    DijkstraPathFinder
    Pathfinder implementation using Dijkstra's algorithm.
    Edge
    Represents an edge (connection) between two nodes in the evacuation graph.
    Edge.BlockType
    The type of blockage affecting this edge.
    Edge.TypeBlocage
    Deprecated.
    Use Edge.BlockType
    Exit
    Represents an evacuation exit node in the graph.
    Graph
    Represents the evacuation graph containing nodes and edges.
    GraphRenderer
    Swing panel that renders the evacuation graph and its agents.
    GraphRenderer.Mode
    Interaction modes for the renderer.
    Main
    Application entry point for the evacuation simulation.
    MainFrame
    The main application window for the evacuation simulation.
    Node
    Represents a node (vertex) in the evacuation graph.
    PathFinder
    Interface for pathfinding algorithms on the evacuation graph.
    SimulationEngine
    The core simulation engine that drives agent movement and danger zone propagation.
